questions.explanation: Internal fertilization occurs inside the female body. Humans, dogs, cows show internal fertilization.
Frogs undergo metamorphosis: egg → tadpole → adult frog. The tadpole looks very different from the adult.

questions.correctAnswer: The cell formed by the fusion of sperm and egg.
questions.explanation: A zygote is the first cell of a new organism, formed when male and female gametes fuse during fertilization.

questions.text: The male reproductive organ in humans is called ________.
questions.explanation: Testes produce sperm cells and male hormone testosterone.
